description: Style Note Your little one will love the look of these denim shorts from gini and jony. Team them with a T-shirt and shoes for a summery look. Product Details Blue denim shorts with two side pockets with an insert pocket inside the left and a zippered pocket inside the right, two back pockets with print and embroidered branding on the left pocket, comfortable waistband with elastic at the back, belt loops and has a push clasp and zipper closure on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry, bleach or soak Wash and dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron on print/embroidery
